title.romaji: Zhandou Wang: Jufeng Zhan Hun 5 - Heit Fan Wai Pian
title.native: 战斗王之飓风战魂5合体番外篇
synonyms: Jufeng Zhan Hun V - Heti Fanwai Pian
飓风战魂V 合体番外篇
Jufeng Zhan Hun 5 - Heti Fanwai Pian
飓风战魂5 合体番外篇

synopsis:
On the continent of War Souls, the genius spinning top boy Ye Xingyun travels to Hurricane Academy to investigate his origins, where he meets Yan, Yi Wenxuan, and Lin Xiaoxi, embarking on an adventure to find the "Star Soul." However, in the world of spinning tops, obtaining the Star Soul is only the beginning of the story. Ye Xingyun and his companions strive to reach the Illusionary Realm and begin protecting the Star Soul alongside Bai Ye. They then face constant harassment and challenges from ambitious individuals, and the peaceful Illusionary Realm may become a battlefield. To protect the secret of the Star Soul and prevent the Illusionary Realm from turning into a war zone, Ye Xingyun and Bai Ye must embark on an unknown journey to find the answers to all the questions.

(Source: Tencent, translated)
